meta.release_notes:
# Changelog
All notable changes to this model will be documented in this file.

## [Unreleased]

## [3.0.0] - 2024-02-15
This model is in status draft, as this is just the conversion of existing model from bamm to samm and not released model.
This version can still be considered for updates.

## [2.0.0] - 2023-04-24
### Added
- added new properties: catenaXId, partClassification, partDescription
### Changed
- changed properties: classification -> itemCategory
- updated exemplary values to depict current state of the model

### Removed

## [1.0.1] - 2023-01-30
### Added
n/a

### Changed
bugfixes due to TC feedback

### Removed

## [1.0.0] - 2022-09-09
### Added
- initial model

### Changed
n/a

### Removed

nodes.label: PartAsSpecified
nodes.description: The aspect model PartAsSpecified belongs to the Part Catalogue. A PartAsSpecified represents a certain OEM catalog part on part number level. Providing a digital representation of the part as specified by the OEM. The link to the serialized part is done via the partId, this can only be done if the respective digital twins was provided by the supplier within the value chain.

nodes.label: partTypeInformation
nodes.description: Encapsulation for data related to the part type.

nodes.label: classification
nodes.description: The classification of the part type according to STEP standard definition.

nodes.label: nameAtOwner
nodes.description: Name of the part as assigned by the part owner.

nodes.label: partVersion
nodes.description: This is the version of the part. The engineering will at times supercede an older part version by a newer one, which might have different material aspects, physical dimensions etc., still maintaining compatibility.

nodes.label: validFrom
nodes.description: Start date of the validity period.

nodes.label: validTo
nodes.description: End date of the validity period.

nodes.label: ownerPartId
nodes.description: PartID as assigned by the part owner. The partID identifies the part in the part owner's data space. The partId does not reference a specific instance of a part and thus should not be confused with the serial number.

nodes.label: PartTypeInformationCharacteristic
nodes.description: The characteristic of the part type.

nodes.label: ValidityPeriodCharacteristic
nodes.description: The characteristic of the validity period.

nodes.label: PartTypeInformationEntity
nodes.description: Encapsulation for data related to the part type

nodes.label: ValidityPeriodEntity
nodes.description: Encapsulation for data related to the validity period.
